title: leptolepia cheilosora
intro: Leptolepia cheilosora, also known as the lip fern or lip-leaved fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leptolepia cheilosora include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, for topical application.
